2606.04705.title: Enhancing MedSAM with a Lightweight Box Predictor for Medical Image Segmentation
2606.04705.paper_summary: Semantic segmentation in medical imaging is a critical yet challenging task due to data scarcity and high variability across modalities. While foundation models like the Segment Anything Model (SAM) show promise, they often struggle with medical images without specific adaptation. Moreover, point prompts, despite being the most natural form of user interaction, provide insufficient spatial context for reliable segmentation, particularly when target structures are irregular or poorly contrasted. In this paper, we propose an enhanced segmentation framework that integrates a lightweight Box Predictor module into the MedSAM architecture. The Box Predictor estimates an approximate bounding box from a single user click using localized image embedding features, providing spatial guidance that reduces the ambiguity of point prompts, while introducing only 1.6M additional parameters and negligible inference overhead. We introduce a two-stage training pipeline where the Box Predictor is trained independently before being integrated into MedSAM. To validate the generalization capability of our method, we conduct extensive evaluations on four diverse datasets (FLARE22, BRISC, BUSI, LungSegDB) spanning distinct imaging modalities, including CT, MRI, and Ultrasound. Our method improves segmentation accuracy and robustness across varied anatomical structures and imaging domains, achieving Dice scores of 0.89 (BUSI), 0.93 (FLARE22), 0.88 (BRISC), and 0.98 (LungSegDB). Code is available at https://github.com/Amirhosseinmovahedi/MedSAM-BoxPredictor
2606.04705.paper_summary_zh: 醫學影像中的語意分割是一項關鍵但具有挑戰性的任務，因為數據稀缺且不同模態之間變異性高。雖然像Segment Anything Model (SAM)這樣的基礎模型顯示出潛力，但它們在沒有特定適應的情況下，往往難以處理醫學影像。此外，點提示儘管是最自然的用戶互動形式，但對於可靠的分割來說提供的空間上下文不足，特別是在目標結構不規則或對比度較差的情況下。在本文中，我們提出了一個增強的分割框架，將輕量級的Box Predictor模塊整合到MedSAM架構中。Box Predictor利用局部圖像嵌入特徵從單個用戶點擊估計近似邊界框，提供空間指導，減少點提示的模糊性，同時僅引入1.6M的額外參數和微不足道的推理開銷。我們引入了一個兩階段的訓練流程，其中Box Predictor在整合到MedSAM之前獨立訓練。為了驗證我們方法的泛化能力，我們在四個不同數據集（FLARE22、BRISC、BUSI、LungSegDB）上進行了廣泛評估，這些數據集涵蓋了不同的影像模態，包括CT、MRI和超聲。我們的方法提高了各種解剖結構和影像領域的分割準確性和穩健性，達到了0.89（BUSI）、0.93（FLARE22）、0.88（BRISC）和0.98（LungSegDB）的Dice分數。代碼可在https://github.com/Amirhosseinmovahedi/MedSAM-BoxPredictor獲得。
2606.04705.author: Amirhossein Movahedisefat et.al.
2606.04705.authors: Amirhossein Movahedisefat, Amirreza Fateh, Mohammad Reza Mohammadi
